overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with short dark hair and a distinctive blue geometric coat exploring a modern, minimalist interior. The character traverses wood-paneled corridors, ascends a carpeted staircase, and walks along an upper walkway in what appears to be a corporate or institutional building with contemporary architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor corridor with wood paneling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a corridor with wood-paneled walls and modern overhead lighting

entered.detail: vertical wood slats covering the walls with warm brown tones and modern aesthetic
large rectangular suspended light fixture with multiple bulbs hanging from ceiling
silver metal handrail running along the left wall beside staircase
grey metal door with electronic card reader on the right side of corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, carpeted corridor with warm wood-paneled walls illuminated by modern overhead fixtures. A metal handrail runs along the left side, and a security door is visible on the right. The environment is quiet and empty, with cool artificial lighting dominating the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell connecting ground floor to upper level

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the carpeted staircase
reaches top of stairs and enters the upper walkway area

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking up the carpeted stairs toward the upper level

entered.detail: carpeted stairs with metal handrails leading up to the second level
transparent glass safety barrier with metal posts overlooking the lower floor
linear array of small spotlights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a carpeted staircase with metal handrails and glass safety barriers. As they climb, the perspective shifts to reveal ceiling spotlights and the upper walkway. The transition from the lower corridor to the upper level marks a change in the spatial layout.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway with glass railings overlooking lobby

events.description: camera tilts upward to show ceiling lights and upper architecture
character turns right and continues along the upper walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level walkway, briefly looking up at ceiling fixtures before turning right to continue

entered.detail: vertical illuminated light strip mounted on the wood-paneled wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the upper walkway with glass railings overlooking the lower level, passing under linear ceiling spotlights. The camera briefly tilts up to capture the ceiling architecture before the character turns right. Vertical wall sconces illuminate the wood paneling along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor approaching secure elevator with large display window

events.description: passing a large illuminated display window showing a bright light source against dark clouds

agents.ego_description: approaching an elevator door at the end of the corridor while passing a large window display on the left

entered.detail: large horizontal window displaying a stormy scene with bright circular light source
metal elevator doors with control panel on the side, set in grey metal frame

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward an elevator door at the corridor's end, passing a large display window on the left showing a dramatic scene with bright illumination. The wood-paneled walls continue, lit by vertical sconces, as the character approaches the metal elevator doors. The environment maintains the modern, clean aesthetic with cool artificial lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a minimalist corporate interior that transitions from a narrow lower corridor to an elevated walkway. It begins with the character walking down a quiet, wood-paneled hallway under cool artificial lighting, passing a metal handrail and a security door. As the character turns left, the camera ascends a carpeted staircase with glass barriers, shifting the perspective from the enclosed corridor to the open architecture of the upper level. The scene then expands along a high walkway overlooking the floor below, passing under linear spotlights before the camera briefly tilts upward to capture the ceiling. Finally, the movement continues past a brightly illuminated display window and vertical wall sconces, leading the character toward a set of metal elevator doors at the end of the hall.
